title: set method signatures inconsistent: create always-Some vs Option
description: custom_emoji_set and space_ban_set require a create input unconditionally, while space_invite_set takes Option<&SpaceInviteCreateInput>. Callers wanting destroy-only on CustomEmoji or SpaceBan cannot express it. All three should take Option<&XxxCreateInput> for a uniform, destroy-only-capable API.
close_reason: decision: create-only methods take &CreateInput (always creating); space_invite_set takes Option<&CreateInput> because destroy-only calls are a real use case; inconsistency is intentional and follows spec semantics
